revision.text:
[[de:Diagonalsternuhr EA47605]] [[File:Digaonalsternuhr.jpg|thumb]] The entries of the '''Diagonal star clock EA47605''' belong to the {{ill|diagonal star clocks|ja|斜め星時計|lt=Diagonalsternuhr|lt_ja=斜め星時計|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/diagonal star clocks|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} of the {{ill|A2 Decan Lists|ja|デカンリストA2|lt=Group A2|lt_ja=グループA2|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/A2 Decan Lists|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, which were depicted on coffins of the {{ill|Middle Kingdom|ja|中王国|lt=|lt_ja=中王国|de|Mittleren Reich|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Middle Kingdom|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The Dekan lists A2 are attested on several coffins of the {{ill|12th Dynasty|ja|第12王朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/12th Dynasty|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト第12王朝|1=Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q719639}} and are considered precursors of the {{ill|Decan List C|ja|デカンリストC|de|Dekanlisten C|1=Decan List C|2=de|3=Dekanlisten C|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Decan List C|13=User:Immanuelle/Decan List C|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In 1907, David Hogarth recovered two fragments of diagonal star clocks in {{ill|Asyut|en|Asyut|qid=Q29962|lt=Asyut|1=Asyut}}. They date to the end of the {{ill|First Intermediate Period (Egypt)|ja|第1中間期 (エジプト)|lt=first Intermediate Period|lt_ja=第1中間期|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/First Intermediate Period (Egypt)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} or the beginning of the Middle Kingdom. The larger fragment, designated “Diagonal star clock EA47605”, is housed in the {{ill|British Museum|en|British Museum|qid=Q6373|lt=British Museum|1=British Museum}}. == Diagonal star clock EA47605 == === Special Features === The Diagonal star clock EA47605 is divided into four sections – the ''date line'', ''upper hours'', ''solar path'' and ''lower hours''. Instead of a daily date, only the first month of the season {{ill|Achet|ja|アシェト|lt=Achet|lt_ja=アシェト|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is indicated. In particular, the date line of the Diagonal star clock EA47605 refutes the previously {{ill|Axiom|en|Axiom|qid=Q17736|lt=Axiom|1=Axiom}} of “missing date lines on all diagonal star clocks of Group 2”. Moreover, the decan recorded as no. 3, {{ill|Cheri-cheped-Kenmut|ja|チェリチェペド・ケンメット|lt=Cheri-cheped-Kenmut|lt_ja=チェリチェペド・ケンメット|de|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cheri-cheped-Kenmut|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, is absent from the otherwise comparable lists of {{ill|A1 Decan Lists|ja|デカンリストA1|lt=Group 1|lt_ja=グループ1|A1 Decan Lists=A1 Decan Lists|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/A1 Decan Lists|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Decan Order === {| class="wikitable" style="width: 100%; border: 2px solid gray;" |- {{Ägyptologie TblHighlight|qq=}} |colspan="12" style="text-align:center; background:#FFE39B"| '''Diagonal star clock EA47605 ({{ill|Dekan lists A2|ja|デカンリストA2|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dekan lists A2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}): First month of the season {{ill|Achet|ja|アシェト|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}''' |- {{Ägyptologie TblHighlight|qq=}} ! Decan No. || {{ill|Egyptian Hieroglyphs|ja|エジプトのヒエログリフ|lt=Hieroglyphs|lt_ja=ヒエログリフ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Egyptian Hieroglyphs|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} || Ancient Egyptian Name || Translation |- | style="text-align:center;" | 1 | D1:D36 V31:n-t G14-N14-N33*N33:N33 | {{ill|Tepi-a Kenmet|ja|テピ・ア・ケンメット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a Kenmet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
''Tpj-ˁ Knm.t'' | ''Head/First of {{ill|Kenmet (Decan)|ja|ケンメット|lt=Kenmet|lt_ja=ケンメット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmet (Decan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}'' |- | style="text-align:center;" | 2 | V31:n-t G14-N14-N33*N33*N33:N33*N33*N33 | {{ill|Kenmet (Decan)|ja|ケンメット|lt=Kenmet|lt_ja=ケンメット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmet (Decan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
''Knm.t'' | ''He who delights the goddess {{ill|Mut|en|Mut|qid=Q29409|lt=Mut|1=Mut}}'' |- | style="text-align:center;" | 3 | W12:D21-Aa1*p:D46-n:V31-t G14-N14-N33 | {{ill|Cheri-cheped-Kenmut|ja|チェリチェペド・ケンメット|lt=Cheri-cheped-Kenmut|lt_ja=チェリチェペド・ケンメット|de|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cheri-cheped-Kenmut|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
''Ḫrj-ḫpd-n-Knm.t'' | ''Bearer of the hind cheek of Kenmet'' |- | style="text-align:center;" | 4 | F4:t-Z1-U28-M17-M17-t N14-N33:N33:N33 | {{ill|Hat-djat|ja|ハット・ジャット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hat-djat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
''Ḥ3t-ḏ3t'' | ''The top/at the top'' |- | style="text-align:center;" | 5 | F22-G43-Z1*Z1 U28-M17-M17-t N14-N33:N33:N33 | {{ill|Pehui-djat|ja|ペフイ・ジャット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Pehui-djat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
''Pḥ.wj-ḏ3j.t'' | ''???'' |- | style="text-align:center;" | 6 | t:T13-D2:t N14-N33:N33*N33 | {{ill|Temat-heret|ja|テマト・ヘレット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Temat-heret|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
''Tm3t-ḥrt'' | ''Upper of the mat'' |- | style="text-align:center;" | Sonnenbahn | N5 | {{ill|Ra|en|Ra|qid=Q1252904|lt=Ra|1=Ra}}
''Rˁ'' | ''Re'' |- | style="text-align:center;" | 7 | t:T13-W12-D21:t N14-N33*N33*N33:N33 | {{ill|Temat-cheret|ja|テマト・チェレット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Temat-cheret|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
''Tm3t-ẖrt'' | ''Lower of the mat'' |- | style="text-align:center;" | 8 | G43-M8:t*Z1*Z1 N14-N33-N33 | {{ill|Weschati-Bekati|ja|ヴェシャティ＝ベカティ|lt=Weschati|lt_ja=ヴェシャティ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Weschati-Bekati|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
''Wš3tj'' | ''???'' |- | style="text-align:center;" | 9 | D58-D28:t*Z4 N14-N33 | {{ill|Weschati-Bekati|ja|ヴェシャティ＝ベカティ|lt=Bekati|lt_ja=ベカティ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Weschati-Bekati|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
''Bk3tj'' | ''???'' |- | style="text-align:center;" | 10 | O42-p:t-N14 | {{ill|Schespet|ja|シェスペット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Schespet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
''Šspt'' | ''???'' |- | style="text-align:center;" | 11 | D1:D36 W17:t*t N14-N33-N33 | {{ill|Tepi-a chentet|ja|テピ・ア・チェンテット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a chentet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
''Tpj-ˁ-ḫntt'' | ''Precursor of the ship'' |- | style="text-align:center;" | 12 | W17:t*t D2 D21:t N14-N33-N33:N33 | {{ill|Chentet-heret|ja|チェンテット・ヘレット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentet-heret|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
''Ḫntt-ḥrt'' | ''Upper part of the ship'' |- | style="text-align:center;" | 13 | W17:t*t W12 D21:t N14-N33:N33-N33 | {{ill|Chentet-cheret|ja|チェンテット・チェレット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentet-cheret|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
''Ḫntt-ẖrt'' | ''Lower part of the ship'' |} === Decan Distribution on the Diagonal Star Clock === {| class="wikitable" style="width: 100%; border: 2px solid gray; text-align: center;" |- {{Ägyptologie TblHighlight|qq=}} |colspan="13" style="text-align:center; background:#FFE39B"| '''Diagonal star clock EA47605: Idealized {{ill|Ancient Egyptian calendar|ja|古代エジプト暦|lt=ancient Egyptian calendar|lt_ja=古代エジプト暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Distribution of decans for the respective decades)''' |- {{Ägyptologie TblHighlight|qq=}} ! {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|ja|ペレト (古代エジプト)|lt=1. P 1|lt_ja=1. P 1|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} || {{ill|Achet|ja|アシェト|lt=21. A 4|lt_ja=21. A 4|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} || 11. A 4 || 1. A 4 || 21. A 3 || 11. A 3 || 1. A 3 || 21. A 2 || 11. A 2 || 1. A 2 || 21. A 1 || 11. A 1 || 1. A 1 |- | '''{{ill|Chentet-cheret|ja|チェンテット・チェレット|lt=Chentet-cheret|lt_ja=チェンテット・チェレット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentet-cheret|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}''' | {{ill|Chentet-heret|ja|チェンテット・ヘレット|lt=Chentet-heret|lt_ja=チェンテット・ヘレット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentet-heret|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}} | {{ill|Tepi-a chentet|ja|テピ・ア・チェンテット|lt=Tepi-a chentet|lt_ja=テピ・ア・チェンテット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a chentet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}} | {{ill|Schespet|ja|シェスペット|lt=Schespet|lt_ja=シェスペット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Schespet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}} | {{ill|Weschati-Bekati|ja|ヴェシャティ＝ベカティ|lt=Weschati-Bekati|lt_ja=ヴェシャティ＝ベカティ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Weschati-Bekati|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}} | {{ill|Weschati-Bekati|ja|ヴェシャティ＝ベカティ|lt=Weschati-Bekati|lt_ja=ヴェシャティ＝ベカティ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Weschati-Bekati|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}} | {{ill|Temat-cheret|ja|テマト・チェレット|lt=Temat-cheret|lt_ja=テマト・チェレット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Temat-cheret|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}} | {{ill|Temat-heret|ja|テマト・ヘレット|lt=Temat-heret|lt_ja=テマト・ヘレット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Temat-heret|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}} | {{ill|Pehui-djat|ja|ペフイ・ジャット|lt=Pehui-djat|lt_ja=ペフイ・ジャット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Pehui-djat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}} | {{ill|Hat-djat|ja|ハット・ジャット|lt=Hat-djat|lt_ja=ハット・ジャット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hat-djat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}} | {{ill|Cheri-cheped-Kenmut|ja|チェリチェペド・ケンメット|lt=Cheri-cheped-Kenmut|lt_ja=チェリチェペド・ケンメット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cheri-cheped-Kenmut|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}} | {{ill|Kenmet (Decan)|ja|ケンメット|lt=Kenmet|lt_ja=ケンメット|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmet (Decan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}} | {{ill|Tepi-a Kenmet|ja|テピ・ア・ケンメット|lt=Tepi-a Kenmet|lt_ja=テピ・ア・ケンメット|de|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a Kenmet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}} |- | 14 || '''13''' || 12 || 11 || 10 || 9 || 8 || 7 || 6 || 5 || 4 || 3 || 2 |- | 15 || 14 || '''13''' || 12 || 11 || 10 || 9 || 8 || 7 || 6 || 5 || 4 || 3 |- | 16 || 15 || 14 || '''13''' || 12 || 11 || 10 || 9 || 8 || 7 || 6 || 5 || 4 |- | 17 || 16 || 15 || 14 || '''13''' || 12 || 11 || 10 || 9 || 8 || 7 || 6 || 5 |- | 18 || 17 || 16 || 15 || 14 || '''13''' || 12 || 11 || 10 || 9 || 8 || 7 || 6 |- | 19 || 18 || 17 || 16 || 15 || 14 || '''13''' || 12 || 11 || 10 || 9 || 8 || 7 |- | 20 || 19 || 18 || 17 || 16 || 15 || 14 || '''13''' || 12 || 11 || 10 || 9 || 8 |- | 21 || 20 || 19 || 18 || 17 || 16 || 15 || 14 || '''13''' || 12 || 11 || 10 || 9 |- | 22 || 21 || 20 || 19 || 18 || 17 || 16 || 15 || 14 || '''13''' || 12 || 11 || 10 |- | 23 || 22 || 21 || 20 || 19 || 18 || 17 || 16 || 15 || 14 || '''13''' || 12 || 11 |- | 24 || 23 || 22 || 21 || 20 || 19 || 18 || 17 || 16 || 15 || 14 || '''13''' || 12 |- | 25 || 24 || 23 || 22 || 21 || 20 || 19 || 18 || 17 || 16 || 15 || 14 || '''13''' |} == See also == * {{ill|Sarcophagus of Heni|ja|ヘニの石棺|lt=Sarg des Heni|lt_ja=ヘニの石棺|de|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarcophagus of Heni|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == Literature == * {{ill|Jochem Kahl|ja|ヨーヘム・カール|lt=Jochem Kahl|lt_ja=ヨーヘム・カール|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jochem Kahl|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''Siut-Thebes: On the Appreciation of Traditions in Ancient Egypt.'' Brill, Leiden 1999, ISBN 90-04-11441-6. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|ja|クリスチャン・ライツ|lt=Christian Leitz|lt_ja=クリスチャン・ライツ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Christian Leitz|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''Ancient Egyptian Star Clocks.'' Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9. * Sarah Symons: ''A Star’s Year: The Annual Cycle in the Ancient Egyptian Sky.'' University of Leicester, 2007 ([http://www2.le.ac.uk/Members/sls25/paperstarsyear online] as PDF file). * Sarah Symons: ''Two fragments of diagonal star clocks in the British Museum.'' In: ''Journal for the History of Astronomy.'' Volume 33, Part 3, No. 112, Leicester 2002, pp. 257–260. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|ja|アレクサンドラ・フォン・リーベン|lt=Alexandra von Lieven|lt_ja=アレクサンドラ・フォン・リーベン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''Outline of the Course of the Stars – The So-called Nutbuch.'' The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies, Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5. == References == {{translated page|de|Diagonalsternuhr EA47605#Dekanverteilung auf der Diagonalsternuhr|version=241601806|comment=Imported full de history}} [[de:Diagonalsternuhr_EA47605#Dekanverteilung auf der Diagonalsternuhr]] [[ja:斜め星時計 EA47605]] [[de:Diagonalsternuhr EA47605]] {{wikidata link|Q1208201}} [[Category:Ancient Egyptian astronomy]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian funerary practices]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]]
